name: Creative Destruction
tagline: Mazirek + Basking Broodscale infinite sac loop -> Exsanguinate / Jarad / Mayhem Devil table (converters), or a pumped Spawn alpha next combat
idea: A Jund land-sacrifice value engine: it treats its own lands as a renewable resource, sacrificing them for cards, mana, tokens, and drain, then returning them to the battlefield bigger with Splendid Reclamation / Crucible / Ramunap / Life from the Loam.

briefKills.line: Mazirek, Kraul Death Priest + Basking Broodscale (any sac ignites; Natural Order / Gamble / Victimize tutor a half) → infinite {C} + infinite sac/death + infinite +1/+1 → Exsanguinate / Jarad / Mayhem Devil drains the table
stationed Hearthhull + repeated land sacs + landfall slugs (Tannuk / Sabotender / Ob Nixilis) → 2/opp per land sac + 1/opp per landfall → passive all-table drain

openings: Weakest axis — Kill reliability (3/5): the judges' soft spot.
Ramp-gated land-sac value; combo (Mazirek+Broodscale) a FINDING side line (~23% of kills).
Decap never-closes in 1% of goldfish games — a grind risk.
Tables (all three) never-close 2% of the time.

clock.src: lab ws_clock_lab @40k on creative-destruction-20260711.txt (Mazirek combo + land-sac drain; promoted 2026-07-11)
clock.caption: Decap (one opponent) lands around T10; the full table around T11.

gamePlan: A Jund land-sacrifice value engine: it treats its own lands as a renewable resource, sacrificing them for cards, mana, tokens, and drain, then returning them to the battlefield bigger with Splendid Reclamation / Crucible / Ramunap / Life from the Loam. The fair plan is a battlecruiser grind — landfall payoffs (Titania, Scute Swarm, Tannuk, Ob Nixilis, Valakut Exploration) plus a stationed Hearthhull that drains 2 from each opponent per land sacrificed. Behind that fair shell sits an Abolisher-proof, wipe-proof 2-card infinite — Mazirek, Kraul Death Priest + Basking Broodscale — that converts to a table kill through Exsanguinate / Jarad / Mayhem Devil / All Will Be One. The deck is not a racer (median decap T10); it out-grinds the pod and closes from a board- and stack-independent combo when the window opens.
winLine: Mazirek + Basking Broodscale infinite sac loop -> Exsanguinate / Jarad / Mayhem Devil table (converters), or a pumped Spawn alpha next combat

finishers.name: Mazirek + Basking Broodscale infinite
finishers.note: Mazirek (any player sacrificing *another* permanent puts a +1/+1 counter on each of your creatures) + Basking Broodscale (a +1/+1 counter on it makes a 0/1 Eldrazi Spawn that sacs for {C}).

finishers.name: Stationed land-sac drain
finishers.note: Hearthhull at 8+ → every land you sacrifice makes each opponent lose 2; the landfall slugs (Tannuk, Sabotender, Ob Nixilis) chip alongside on the refetch wave.

finishers.name: Springheart landfall
finishers.note: Springheart Nantuko enchanting a Lotus Cobra / Tireless Provisioner, with Ashaya or Badgermole making lands into creatures → infinite landfall → infinite tokens / mana / drain triggers.

finishers.name: Battlecruiser combat
finishers.note: Titania / Scute Swarm / land-token board + Purphoros / All Will Be One counter-pings → focus one opponent; the deck's decap floor.

finishers.name: Gitrog + Dakmor Salvage
finishers.note: bottomless discard-loop self-mill + draw that fills the yard for Splendid Reclamation (not a standalone win — no Thassa's Oracle).

rulings.name: Hearthhull, the Worldseed
rulings.note: the "each opponent loses 2 per land sac" drain sits inside the 8+ box; it does nothing until the ship is stationed to 8 (sorcery-speed only). Station taps another creature for its power in charge. The 2+ "play an additional land" is cumulative — with Icetill Explorer / Oracle of Mul Daya out you get three land plays that turn.

rulings.name: Mazirek, Kraul Death Priest
rulings.note: triggers on a player sacrificing another permanent, so Mazirek sacrificing itself doesn't fire it, but he counts every other sac by any player (yours or an opponent's). This is what powers the Broodscale loop (each Spawn sac is "another permanent").

rulings.name: Basking Broodscale
rulings.note: devoid (colorless). Natural Order fetches a green creature, so it can grab Mazirek but cannot fetch Broodscale; Gamble finds either half, Victimize returns both from the yard. The token trigger is "one or more +1/+1 counters," so one Mazirek trigger = one Spawn per counter event.

rulings.name: Splendid Reclamation
rulings.note: returns all land cards from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped, simultaneously; a big pile of sacrificed lands returns as one landfall wave (each is a Titania/Tannuk/Valakut trigger).

rulings.name: Basking Broodscale / Mazirek is Abolisher-proof
rulings.note: the loop's payoffs (Exsanguinate cast aside, Jarad/Mayhem Devil are activated/triggered abilities, All Will Be One is a static) fire through Grand Abolisher and don't use the stack in a way a single counter answers.

keep.mixed: ramp-gated land-sac value; combo (Mazirek+Broodscale) a FINDING side line (~23% of kills)

mull.strategy: Keep 2–5 lands with your mana coming online roughly on curve. Ramp-gated land-sac value; combo (Mazirek+Broodscale) a FINDING side line (~23% of kills).

killTree.title: Creative Destruction — Hearthhull, the Worldseed
killTree.root:
Jund land-sac value — sacrifice your OWN lands for draw / ramp / drain, then rebuy them bigger
Hearthhull stationed to 8+ → every land you sacrifice makes each opponent lose 2
killTree.stall:
ramp + develop lands, station Hearthhull toward 8, and dig with the land engine —
the combo is the fast Abolisher-proof close; the fair drain / combat plan is the floor
killTree.caption: cheapest line first · fall to the next

background.need:
stationed Hearthhull (8+) + a land-sac engine
(Splendid Reclamation / Crucible / Ramunap rebuys)
background.kill: 2 to each opponent per land sacrifice

lines.need:
Mazirek, Kraul Death Priest + Basking Broodscale
(any sac ignites; Natural Order / Gamble / Victimize tutor a half)
lines.kill: infinite {C} + infinite sac/death + infinite +1/+1 → Exsanguinate / Jarad / Mayhem Devil drains the table

lines.need:
stationed Hearthhull + repeated land sacs
+ landfall slugs (Tannuk / Sabotender / Ob Nixilis)
lines.kill: 2/opp per land sac + 1/opp per landfall → passive all-table drain

lines.need:
Springheart Nantuko + Lotus Cobra / Tireless Provisioner
+ Ashaya / Badgermole (lands are creatures)
lines.kill: infinite landfall → infinite tokens / mana / drain triggers

lines.need:
Titania / Scute Swarm / land-token board + Purphoros / All Will Be One
(counters → damage) (fallback)
lines.kill: wide land-creature board + ETB / counter pings → focus one opponent

lines.need:
The Gitrog Monster + Dakmor Salvage
(discard-loop self-mill) (enabler)
lines.kill: bottomless card advantage + yard-fill → fuels Splendid Reclamation mass returns
